title: siphocampylus planchonis var. polyphyllus
intro: Siphocampylus planchonis var. polyphyllus, commonly known as a plant species of the Campanulaceae family, is a type of flowering plant used in traditional medicine. The health benefits of this plant include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The therapeutic actions of Siphocampylus planchonis var. polyphyllus include its use as a treatment for various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other secondary metabolites, which contribute to its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Siphocampylus planchonis var. polyphyllus can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals.
